name: IDfy
description: Identity verification, KYC, KYB, background checks and fraud mitigation APIs — 70M+ verifications for 600+ customers.

seo.title: IDfy — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: IDfy: Identity verification, KYC, KYB, background checks and fraud mitigation APIs — 70M+ verifications for 600+ customers.

when_to_use: Indian Aadhaar and PAN verification for fintech KYC
Background check API for employee onboarding screening
Business verification for marketplace seller onboarding
Face match and liveness API for remote identity verification
Court record and criminal history check for NBFC lending

pros: KYC, KYB, background checks in one stack
Strong coverage across India and Asia
Fraud mitigation bundled, not an upsell
cons: Competes hard with Signzy and Surepass locally
Enterprise sales cycle slows startup adoption
API feel less polished than US-built vendors
review.verdict: Proven Asia-focused IDV and background checks platform, less compelling for US-only buyers.
review.best_for: Asian fintechs, insurers and enterprises needing large-scale KYC, KYB and background checks
review.not_for: US-only teams that prefer locally-built stacks like Persona, Alloy or Middesk

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
